company.name: Power On Interio
company.tagline: Commercial and residential interiors planned with clarity and delivered with care.
company.description: Power On Interio designs and delivers commercial and residential interiors with practical planning, refined finishes, and dependable execution across Bangalore, Chennai, and Hyderabad.
company.heroDescription: We create commercial offices, homes, and utility-led interiors that balance function, finish quality, and day-to-day usability.
